[SQL: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', createddate) AS month, COUNT(*) AS case_count
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2020-06-10' AND createddate < DATE '2021-04-11'
  AND orderitemid__c IN (
    SELECT id FROM orderitem__c WHERE product2id__c IN ('01tWt000006hVJdIAM', '#01tWt000006hVJdIAM')

GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month;]

args.query:
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"+0000"'), 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
       COUNT(*) AS case_count
FROM "Case"
WHERE TO_TIMESTAMP(createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"+0000"') >= TIMESTAMP '2020-06-10 00:00:00'
  AND TO_TIMESTAMP(createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"+0000"') < TIMESTAMP '2021-04-11 00:00:00'
  AND orderitemid__c IN (
    SELECT id FROM orderitem__c WHERE product2id__c IN ('01tWt000006hVJdIAM', '#01tWt000006hVJdIAM')
)
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_TIMESTAMP(createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"+0000"'), 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
       COUNT(*) AS case_count
FROM "Case"
WHERE TO_TIMESTAMP(createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"+0000"') >= TIMESTAMP '2020-06-10 00:00:00'
  AND TO_TIMESTAMP(createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"+0000"') < TIMESTAMP '2021-04-11 00:00:00'
  AND orderitemid__c IN (
    SELECT id FROM orderitem__c WHERE product2id__c IN ('01tWt000006hVJdIAM', '#01tWt000006hVJdIAM')
)
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month;

result.preview: "I\u2019m unable to link support cases in the support database to the specific product ID 01tWt000006hVJdIAM using the available schema. The support database\u2019s Case table only has an orderitemid__c field, but there is no corresponding order item table or product mapping in this database, and cross-database joins are not supported by the tools provided. Because of this, I cannot reliably isolate \u201cSecureAnalytics Pro\u201d cases and determine whether there is a particular month in the past 10 months where their volume significantly exceeds other months."
